name: The Golf Pub
about: Warner Robins' premier indoor golf simulator venue offering a fun and competitive golfing experience with cutting-edge technology. Play on world-renowned courses no matter the weather.
why_golfers_like_it: Offers 'State-of-the-Art Simulators' allowing play on nearly every golf course in the world, regardless of weather. Includes free club rentals.

food_and_drink.food: No kitchen on-site; food delivery via QR code from neighbor Luna Taqueria.
food_and_drink.drinks: Full bar serving Georgia breweries, domestics, non-alcoholic beverages, and seltzers.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs if clean, or use house clubs provided for free.

faq.question: What is the dress code?
faq.answer: No cut-off shirts, boots, heeled or open-toed shoes. Clean, spike-less athletic shoes required.

faq.question: Can I come if I'm not golfing?
faq.answer: Yes, you can watch sports, enjoy drinks, or use the game room (30 min limit for game play).

faq.question: Is food available?
faq.answer: Food can be ordered via QR code from Luna Taqueria next door. No outside drinks allowed.

faq.question: Do you offer private event hosting?
